name: io.github.novyxlabs/novyx-mcp
title: Novyx MCP
description: Persistent memory for AI agents. 91 MCP tools for remember, recall, rollback, audit, knowledge graph, eval, governed actions, threat intelligence, auto-defense, and correlation. Works locally with zero-config SQLite or with Novyx Cloud for the full surface. Every Novyx customer makes every other customer safer.
